title: Keeg's Thick Bricks
description:
Keeg here with another simple texture pack from my SMP server. Ever thought the brick texture looked odd? Anyways I redesigned it, based on the stone brick texture.

This just changes bricks and blocks using that one texture.
body:
Keeg here with another simple texture pack from my SMP server. Ever thought the brick texture looked odd? Anyways I redesigned it, based on the stone brick texture.
